data.acceptance:
* src/domain/state.rs no longer defines a KnotState enum or any hardcoded state list, alias map, terminal set, or transition table.
  * State is represented as a string newtype validated against the knot's installed Workflow at read/parse time.
  * is_terminal, rank/ordering, and transition validity are answered by querying the Workflow (bundle), not by matching Rust variants.
  * Legacy aliases (idea, work_item, implemented, approved, refining, rejected, etc.) are declared in bundle/migration data, not in Rust source.
  * Installing a loom workflow with a new state name Just Works — no Rust edit required — and make sanity still passes.
  * All existing tests updated; coverage stays at or above the ratchet threshold.
